articles.title: Scratching that bug bite might feel good at first but science explains why it’s a bad idea
articles.description:
Now researchers better understand why even a mildly annoying itch could put you on an itch-and-scratch cycle if you give in.

The post Scratching that bug bite might feel good at first but science explains why it’s a bad idea appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Researchers reveal scratching bug bites can lead to a persistent itch-scratch cycle.
Study highlights the science behind itch response, affecting many Boston residents.
Understanding this can help locals manage discomfort during peak bug seasons.

articles.title: At the Great American State Fair, you can find a dinosaur’s rib cage. Unity is another matter.
articles.description:
The fair kicked off this week and is run by Freedom 250, an organization created by President Donald Trump to run his administration's official events.

The post At the Great American State Fair, you can find a dinosaur’s rib cage. Unity is another matter. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The Great American State Fair opened this week in Boston, showcasing unique exhibits.
Freedom 250, linked to Trump, organizes the fair's official events.
Local residents can explore attractions like a dinosaur's rib cage at the fair.

articles.title: Are Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce getting married at Madison Square Garden? What we know.

Nothing has been publicly confirmed by the couple.

Local fans express excitement over possible celebrity presence in the city.

articles.title: Iranian drones attack Bahrain, ship is struck in the Strait of Hormuz
articles.description:
The attacks across the Persian Gulf show the danger of the Iran war again spinning out of control.

The post Iranian drones attack Bahrain, ship is struck in the Strait of Hormuz appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Iranian drones attacked Bahrain, escalating tensions in the Persian Gulf region.
The Strait of Hormuz, a critical shipping route, was struck, affecting global trade.
Boston residents may face increased oil prices due to heightened geopolitical instability.
